  "claims": [
    "KLH-immunotherapy utilizes the body's immune system to fight off disease.",
    "Keyhole Limpet Hemocyanin (KLH) is a rare protein extracted from sea creatures found only along a small section of the California coast.",

    "KLH is used in treatments for life-threatening illnesses such as cancer, immune disorders, inflammatory diseases, and Alzheimer's disease.",
    "The demand for KLH protein has led to unsustainable fishery and manufacturing practices that threaten marine ecosystems.",
